title: UK REACH authorisation for ADCR Consortium (passivation of (non-Al) metallic coatings), review report, 24 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance names   Sodium dichromate  Potassium dichromate    Authorised use   Passivation of (non-Al) metallic coatings using sodium dichromate and potassium dichromate in the aerospace and defence industry and its supply chains.   Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number   ADCR Consortium: Brenntag UK Ltd (UKREACH/25/11/00, UKREACH/25/11/01)   Date of decision   24 February 2025  "
